modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to view the revision history in Google Sites.

full_description_text: The user is trying to access the revision history feature in Google Sites but is encountering difficulties. They are unsure of the steps needed to view past changes made to their site. This issue is affecting their ability to track modifications and collaborate effectively on the project.
short_description: Unable to view the revision history in Google Sites.
description: The user is trying to access the revision history feature in Google Sites but is encountering difficulties. They are unsure of the steps needed to view past changes made to their site. This issue is affecting their ability to track modifications and collaborate effectively on the project.
